description: The dashboard provides a single pane of view of critical parameters like MTTR, MTBF, Mean Time to Acknowledge, MTTR over time, MTBF over time that helps provide all the information about the Incident process in one place.

panels.description: Displays the SLA compliance rate wrt major incidents being resolved within SLA levels in percentage.

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
SUM((CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`SLM Status` = 'Within the Service Target' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.00)*100/SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`SLM Status` IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.00 AS CF1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
((`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company))
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service))
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Major Incident` = 'Yes')
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Date` <= $__to/1000))
having SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`SLM Status` IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END)*1 > 0

panels.title: SLA compliance rate

panels.description: Displays the count of Major Incident Count against the filters.

calculatedFieldList.selectionCalculatedFields: Incident Management -> Percentage of SLA Met Incidents
calculatedFieldList.selectionQuery: SUM((CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`SLM Status` = 'Within the Service Target' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.00)*100/SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`SLM Status` IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.00

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID` AS C1,
SUM((CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`SLM Status` = 'Within the Service Target' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.00)*100/SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`SLM Status` IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.00 AS CF1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
GROUP BY
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(CASE WHEN (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Major Incident` = 'Yes') THEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` END) As inccount
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE (
   (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service))
   AND `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Date` <= $__to/1000
)

panels.title: Major incident count

panels.description: The ratio derived by total Major Incidents (MI flag as ‘Yes’) that were closed to the total number of closed incidents

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID` AS C1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
GROUP BY
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
(COUNT(CASE WHEN (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Major Incident` = 'Yes') THEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` END)*1.00)*100/(COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`)*1.00) As percentage
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE (
   (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service))
   AND `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Date` <= $__to/1000
)
having COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`) > 0

panels.title: Major incident percentage

panels.description: Mean time to resolution of incidents within the selected set of filters

calculatedFieldList.selectionCalculatedFields: Incident Management -> Avg MTTR in days
calculatedFieldList.selectionQuery: AVG(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` in ('Resolved','Closed') THEN DateDiff('dd',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`,`HPD:Help Desk`.`Last Resolved Date`) ELSE 0 END)

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
`HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` AS C1,
AVG(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` in ('Resolved','Closed') THEN DateDiff('dd',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`,`HPD:Help Desk`.`Last Resolved Date`) ELSE 0 END) AS CF1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company) 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`Major Incident` = 'Yes' 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service) 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000 

)
GROUP BY
`HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI`

LIMIT 100

panels.title: MTTR (in days)

panels.description: Mean time between failure of incidents within the selected set of filters

calculatedFieldList.selectionCalculatedFields: Asset Availability -> Avg MTBF in days
calculatedFieldList.selectionQuery: Avg(`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Time Between System Incidents`)

groupByField.selectionColumnName: Date -> AST:CI Unavailability CI Join -> Actual Start Date

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
DATE(`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Actual Start Date`) AS __time__,
Avg(`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Time Between System Incidents`) AS CF1
FROM
`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join` 
INNER JOIN (`HPD:Help Desk` )
ON (`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Name` = `HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI`)
WHERE 
(
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company) 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service) 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`Major Incident` = 'Yes' 
And `AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Actual Start Date` >= $__from/1000 
And `AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Actual Start Date` <= $__to/1000 

)
GROUP BY
`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Actual Start Date`

LIMIT 100

leftOperand.fieldName: AST:CI Unavailability CI Join -> Actual Start Date
AST:CI Unavailability CI Join -> Actual Start Date

selectionList.selectionColumnName: AST:CI Unavailability CI Join -> Actual Start Date

panels.title: MTBF  (in days)

panels.description: Mean time to acknowledge of incidents within the selected set of filters

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
DATE(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`) AS Submit_Date,
AVG(DateDiff('ss',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Date`,`HPD:Help Desk`.`Major Incident Accepted Date`)/3600) AS CF1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company) 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service) 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`Major Incident` = 'Yes' 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000 

)
GROUP BY
DATE(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`)
ORDER BY
DATE(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`) ASC
 
LIMIT 100

panels.title: MTTA  (in hrs)

panels.description: Analysis of MTTR by support groups

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT
(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` Is not Null THEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` ELSE 'Unassigned' END) AS AssignedGroup,
AVG(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` in ('Resolved','Closed') THEN DateDiff('dd',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`,`HPD:Help Desk`.`Last Resolved Date`) ELSE 0 END) AS CF1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Major Incident` = 'Yes') and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service))
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Date` <= $__to/1000)
GROUP BY
AssignedGroup
ORDER BY AssignedGroup
Limit 10

panels.title: MTTR (in days) by support groups

panels.description: Average mean time between between failure of services by days / weeks / months as applicable.

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
SubStr(datename('mm',`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Actual Start Date`),0,2)+ ' '+upper(Year(`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Actual Start Date`)) AS monthyear,
Avg(`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Time Between System Incidents`)/86400 AS CF1
FROM
`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join` 
INNER JOIN (`HPD:Help Desk` )
ON (`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Name` = `HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI`)
WHERE 
(
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company) 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service) 
And `HPD:Help Desk`.`Major Incident` = 'Yes' 
And `AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Actual Start Date` >= $__from/1000 
And `AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Actual Start Date` <= $__to/1000 

)
GROUP BY
`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join`.`Actual Start Date`

LIMIT 100

panels.title: MTBF (in days) by Months

panels.description: Analysis of MTTA by support groups

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT
(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` Is not Null THEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` ELSE 'Unassigned' END) AS AssignedGroup,
AVG(DateDiff('ss',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Date`,`HPD:Help Desk`.`Major Incident Accepted Date`))/3600 AS Avg_MTTAcknowledge_in_days
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service)) and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Major Incident`= 'Yes'
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Date` <= $__to/1000)
GROUP BY
AssignedGroup
ORDER BY AssignedGroup
Limit 10

panels.title: MTTA (in hrs) by support groups

panels.description: Month-wise/Day wise analysis of SLA compliance rate.

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
SUM((CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`SLM Status` = 'Within the Service Target' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.00)*100/SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`SLM Status` IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.00 AS CF1,
DATE(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Date`) AS __time__
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
((`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company))
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service))
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Major Incident` = 'Yes')
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Date` <= $__to/1000))
group by __time__
having SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`SLM Status` IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END)*1 > 0

panels.title: SLA compliance rate by months

panels.description: Displays the counts of the major incidents by days/weeks/months.

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(CASE WHEN (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Major Incident` = 'Yes') THEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` END) As inccount,
SubStr(datename('mm',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Date`),0,2)+ ' '+upper(Year(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Date`)) AS monthyear
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE (
   (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` In ($Service)) and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Major Incident`='Yes')
   AND `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Date` <= $__to/1000
)
group by monthyear

panels.title: Major incident volumes by months / days
